name: Spider-man Tsum Tsum
description: You're a photographer working for a newspaper, usually taking pictures of adorable things, until one day your boss asks you for a picture of Spider-Man, all because he saved some cats last week and it would be good publicity for the newspaper. So just as you're about to take the picture, something hits you on the head and it's Spider-Man Tsum Tsum.
creator: ertttyty
